revision.comment: Created page with "This wiki is intended to be imported into English wikipedia at some point. Please use [[Special:Import]] for attribution, especially since many pages have users other than [[User:Immanuelle]] having worked on them because they were imported from other wikipedia projects"
revision.text: This wiki is intended to be imported into English wikipedia at some point. Please use [[Special:Import]] for attribution, especially since many pages have users other than [[User:Immanuelle]] having worked on them because they were imported from other wikipedia projects

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This wiki is intended to be imported into English wikipedia at some point. Please use [[Special:Import]] for attribution, especially since many pages have users other than [[User:Immanuelle]] having worked on them because they were imported from other wikipedia projects
[[Category:11]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
revision.text: This wiki is intended to be imported into English wikipedia at some point. Please use [[Special:Import]] for attribution, especially since many pages have users other than [[User:Immanuelle]] having worked on them because they were imported from other wikipedia projects

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Copyrights here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Copyrights for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> This wiki is intended to be imported into English wikipedia at some point. Please use [[Special:Import]] for attribution, especially since many pages have users other than [[User:Immanuelle]] having worked on them because they were imported from other wikipedia projects
